column5: 書く → 書きます: godan conjugation — replace final /ku/ with /ki/ + ます; the i-stem is used before polite suffix
column7: module:01-n5 jlpt:n5 point:う-Verbs source:shin-kanzen frequency:top1k complexity:intro

column3: ともだちとはなします。
column5: 話す → 話します: godan す-verb — す → し + ます; /s/ palatalizes to /sh/ before /i/; phonological shift
column7: module:01-n5 jlpt:n5 point:う-Verbs source:shin-kanzen frequency:top1k complexity:intro

column3: あたらしいほんをかいます。
column5: 買う → 買います: godan う-verb — final /u/ → /i/ + ます; the glide /w/ disappears before /i/ in modern Japanese
column7: module:01-n5 jlpt:n5 point:う-Verbs source:shin-kanzen frequency:top1k complexity:intro

column5: godan 行く (irregular but classed as う)
column7: module:01-n5 jlpt:n5 point:う-Verbs source:shin-kanzen frequency:top1k complexity:intro
